domains.title: Travel Cognitive Infrastructure
domains.vision: Cognitive orchestration for travel intent, decision graphs, emergency flows, accessibility, replay, and governed handoff into customer-owned booking or operations systems.
domains.roadmap_visibility: Operational APIs available now with expanding provider handoff and replay depth.

domains.title: Healthcare Cognitive Infrastructure
domains.vision: Governed cognitive infrastructure for care workflows, clinical operations, accessibility, compliance-aware orchestration, and explainable decision support without replacing clinical systems.
domains.roadmap_visibility: Coming Soon. Documentation, Ask COGNI roadmap context, and enterprise planning visibility are available.

domains.title: Legal Cognitive Infrastructure
domains.vision: Explainable legal workflow cognition for document understanding, matter orchestration, compliance boundaries, and audit-ready reasoning.
domains.roadmap_visibility: Coming Soon. Domain roadmap is searchable and Ask COGNI-aware.

domains.title: Drone Cognitive Infrastructure
domains.vision: Cognitive infrastructure for drone fleet coordination, docking, drone-in-a-box operations, edge replay, safety governance, and operational traceability.
domains.roadmap_visibility: Operational APIs available now across drone and drone operations metadata.

domains.title: Robotics Cognitive Infrastructure
domains.vision: Adaptive robotics cognition for intent overlays, workflow coordination, distributed synchronization, governance, and explainable orchestration.
domains.roadmap_visibility: Beta APIs are visible with sandbox execution and roadmap expansion.

domains.title: Cobotics Cognitive Infrastructure
domains.vision: Human-machine shared workspace cognition for collaboration, safety adaptation, accessibility, and explainable handoffs.
domains.roadmap_visibility: Beta APIs are available with governance and replay visibility.

domains.title: Multilingual Cognitive Infrastructure
domains.vision: Language, speech, translation, and multimodal cognition infrastructure for enterprise workflows and cross-domain orchestration.
domains.roadmap_visibility: Coming Soon. Multimodal and multilingual roadmap is visible to search and Ask COGNI.

domains.title: Enterprise Workflow Cognitive Infrastructure
domains.vision: Core enterprise workflow cognition for platform phases, CEF components, tenant governance, API keys, billing, observability, SDKs, and lifecycle operations.
domains.roadmap_visibility: Operational platform APIs are available now.

domains.title: IoT & Smart Infrastructure Cognition
domains.vision: Cognitive infrastructure for smart buildings, sensor fusion, infrastructure health, edge operations, and replayable decisions.
domains.roadmap_visibility: Coming Soon. Roadmap panel provides capability and use-case visibility.

domains.title: Autonomous Systems Cognitive Infrastructure
domains.vision: Cross-domain cognition for autonomous systems, safety governance, distributed coordination, replay, and explainable autonomy boundaries.
domains.roadmap_visibility: Coming Soon. Built to connect future autonomy APIs to replay and governance systems.

domains.title: Education & Learning Cognitive Infrastructure
domains.vision: Learning workflow cognition for education platforms, adaptive learning paths, assessment orchestration, and explainable learning support.
domains.roadmap_visibility: Coming Soon. Roadmap data is searchable and Ask COGNI-aware.

domains.title: Smart Governance & Public Systems Cognition
domains.vision: Governance cognition for policy propagation, public systems, tenant boundaries, audit evidence, replay, and explainable operational decisions.
domains.roadmap_visibility: Operational governance APIs are available now with future public systems expansion.

apis.name: Phase Intent Engine API
apis.short_description: Transforms raw user or system input into graph-native cognitive intent.
apis.full_description: Transforms raw user or system input into graph-native cognitive intent. Capability: Intent cognition. Billing: Usage based.

apis.name: Domain Taxonomy API
apis.short_description: Discovers supported domains, capabilities, inheritance, and composition constraints.
apis.full_description: Discovers supported domains, capabilities, inheritance, and composition constraints. Capability: Domain discovery. Billing: Included.

apis.name: Cognitive Routing API
apis.short_description: Routes cognitive requests to the correct domain, model, policy, and orchestration substrate.
apis.full_description: Routes cognitive requests to the correct domain, model, policy, and orchestration substrate. Capability: Cognitive routing. Billing: Per orchestration.

apis.name: CEF Registry API
apis.short_description: Lists CEF-1 through CEF-14 components and their operational readiness.
apis.full_description: Lists CEF-1 through CEF-14 components and their operational readiness. Capability: Framework registry. Billing: Included.

apis.name: CEF Execution Lifecycle API
apis.short_description: Creates cognitive execution contexts with state, lifecycle, validation, and audit tracking.
apis.full_description: Creates cognitive execution contexts with state, lifecycle, validation, and audit tracking. Capability: Execution lifecycle. Billing: Per execution.

apis.name: Cognitive Metadata Contract API
apis.short_description: Validates IDs, hashes, lineage, timestamps, distributed flags, and replay metadata.
apis.full_description: Validates IDs, hashes, lineage, timestamps, distributed flags, and replay metadata. Capability: Metadata validation. Billing: Included.

apis.name: Travel Intent Cognition API
apis.short_description: Builds hierarchical travel intent graphs without booking or provider execution.
apis.full_description: Builds hierarchical travel intent graphs without booking or provider execution. Capability: Travel cognition. Billing: Usage based.

apis.name: Travel Decision Graph API
apis.short_description: Generates all viable travel options and rankings without final selection.
apis.full_description: Generates all viable travel options and rankings without final selection. Capability: Travel decisions. Billing: Usage based.

apis.name: Travel Emergency Orchestration API
apis.short_description: Creates emergency travel cognition, checkpoints, and escalation handoff plans.
apis.full_description: Creates emergency travel cognition, checkpoints, and escalation handoff plans. Capability: Emergency orchestration. Billing: Orchestration billing.

apis.name: Drone Fleet Coordination API
apis.short_description: Coordinates drone fleet cognition, edge autonomy, safety policies, and replay traces.
apis.full_description: Coordinates drone fleet cognition, edge autonomy, safety policies, and replay traces. Capability: Fleet cognition. Billing: Orchestration billing.

apis.name: Drone Docking Cognition API
apis.short_description: Plans docking station cognition, charging orchestration, and safety governance.
apis.full_description: Plans docking station cognition, charging orchestration, and safety governance. Capability: Docking operations. Billing: Per operation.

apis.name: Drone-in-a-Box Operations API
apis.short_description: Generates cognitive plans for box deployment, recovery, monitoring, and replay.
apis.full_description: Generates cognitive plans for box deployment, recovery, monitoring, and replay. Capability: Drone operational ecosystem. Billing: Per operation.

apis.name: Robotics Intent Overlay API
apis.short_description: Builds hierarchical robotics cognition graphs for non-aerial robotics orchestration.
apis.full_description: Builds hierarchical robotics cognition graphs for non-aerial robotics orchestration. Capability: Robotics cognition. Billing: Usage based.

apis.name: Robotics Workflow Orchestration API
apis.short_description: Coordinates adaptive workflow cognition for logistics, inspection, manufacturing, and accessibility.
apis.full_description: Coordinates adaptive workflow cognition for logistics, inspection, manufacturing, and accessibility. Capability: Workflow orchestration. Billing: Orchestration billing.

apis.name: Distributed Robotics Coordination API
apis.short_description: Synchronizes robotics cognition across distributed robots, regions, and edge contexts.
apis.full_description: Synchronizes robotics cognition across distributed robots, regions, and edge contexts. Capability: Distributed robotics. Billing: Distributed billing.

apis.name: Shared Workspace Cognition API
apis.short_description: Assesses human-machine shared workspace state, safety margin, accessibility, and cooperation signals.
apis.full_description: Assesses human-machine shared workspace state, safety margin, accessibility, and cooperation signals. Capability: Cobotics cognition. Billing: Usage based.

apis.name: Collaborative Adaptation API
apis.short_description: Explains and plans collaboration shifts based on human state, workflow, and safety context.
apis.full_description: Explains and plans collaboration shifts based on human state, workflow, and safety context. Capability: Collaborative orchestration. Billing: Orchestration billing.

apis.name: Deterministic Replay API
apis.short_description: Reconstructs cognitive executions, orchestration lineage, confidence evolution, and governance propagation.
apis.full_description: Reconstructs cognitive executions, orchestration lineage, confidence evolution, and governance propagation. Capability: Replay reconstruction. Billing: Replay billing.

apis.name: Replay Visualization API
apis.short_description: Returns visualizable replay nodes, edges, decisions, governance checkpoints, and confidence deltas.
apis.full_description: Returns visualizable replay nodes, edges, decisions, governance checkpoints, and confidence deltas. Capability: Replay explorer. Billing: Replay billing.

apis.name: Governance Validation API
apis.short_description: Validates cognitive artifacts against tenant, safety, industrial, healthcare, privacy, and workflow policies.
apis.full_description: Validates cognitive artifacts against tenant, safety, industrial, healthcare, privacy, and workflow policies. Capability: Governance enforcement. Billing: Governance billing.

apis.name: Governance Propagation API
apis.short_description: Propagates governance constraints across composed graphs, distributed cognition, and orchestration stages.
apis.full_description: Propagates governance constraints across composed graphs, distributed cognition, and orchestration stages. Capability: Governance propagation. Billing: Governance billing.

apis.name: Cognitive Observability API
apis.short_description: Reports API health, latency, success rate, governance activity, replay integrity, and tenant operations.
apis.full_description: Reports API health, latency, success rate, governance activity, replay integrity, and tenant operations. Capability: Operational observability. Billing: Observability billing.

apis.name: Orchestration Trace API
apis.short_description: Lists orchestration traces, distributed sync events, anomalies, edge visibility, and confidence drift.
apis.full_description: Lists orchestration traces, distributed sync events, anomalies, edge visibility, and confidence drift. Capability: Trace inspection. Billing: Observability billing.

apis.name: Tenant Governance API
apis.short_description: Validates tenant isolation, workspace policy, API entitlements, quota, and replay access boundaries.
apis.full_description: Validates tenant isolation, workspace policy, API entitlements, quota, and replay access boundaries. Capability: Tenant governance. Billing: Enterprise plan.

apis.name: API Key Management API
apis.short_description: Creates, rotates, scopes, and revokes tenant-safe API keys for domains and environments.
apis.full_description: Creates, rotates, scopes, and revokes tenant-safe API keys for domains and environments. Capability: API key management. Billing: Included.

apis.name: API Cart API
apis.short_description: Adds APIs, bundles, plans, and orchestration units to a commercial subscription cart.
apis.full_description: Adds APIs, bundles, plans, and orchestration units to a commercial subscription cart. Capability: API commerce. Billing: Free operation.

apis.name: Subscription Management API
apis.short_description: Creates and manages free, developer, startup, enterprise, orchestration, replay, governance, and observability subscriptions.
apis.full_description: Creates and manages free, developer, startup, enterprise, orchestration, replay, governance, and observability subscriptions. Capability: Subscription management. Billing: Plan based.

apis.name: Authentication Token API
apis.short_description: Issues tenant-scoped access tokens for sandbox, production, and simulated environment modes.
apis.full_description: Issues tenant-scoped access tokens for sandbox, production, and simulated environment modes. Capability: Authentication. Billing: Included.

apis.name: Enterprise SSO API
apis.short_description: Configures enterprise SSO metadata, workspace roles, audit policy, and governance isolation.
apis.full_description: Configures enterprise SSO metadata, workspace roles, audit policy, and governance isolation. Capability: Enterprise authentication. Billing: Enterprise plan.
